The '''Keeramak Entourage''' was the [[Ssi-ruuvi]] fleet that accompanied the [[Keeramak]] on its mission to [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]. The formation consisted of two [[Sh'ner-class planetary assault carrier]]s (''[[Firrinree]]'' and ''[[Errinung'ka]]''), several [[Fw'Sen-class picket ship]]s, seven [[D'kee-class landing ship]]s, and a number of smaller battle [[Droid/Legends|droids]] and support [[Starship/Legends|ships]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]''
